reading:
### Past
The Fool in your past speaks of a leap taken with open-hearted trust, when you chose possibility over certainty.

### Present
The Magician stands with you now — your tools and will are aligned; what you focus on can take tangible form.

### Future
The Star ahead promises quiet renewal after difficulty, a gentle light guiding your next chapter.

### Message
Trust the path you are shaping; the universe mirrors the clarity you bring to it.
easternTeaser: Beside me sits a philosopher drawn to your fate — he whispers that yin and yang, and the dance of the five elements, could open a deeper chapter. Shall we invite him to walk with us for a fuller reading?
